title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Carrot, Unknown person #5, Chopper, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Perospero as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was he brought down with the Explo- sion?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: BUWAAH! I thought I was gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until just now, the chance we would get out of this safely was 0%!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we let this second go to waste,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll never be able to face Pedro again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Leave the sails as they are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Set bearings to Northwest! Fire coup de burst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell me what to do! I'll do it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: EVERY LAST ONE OF YOU BASTARDS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All ships, aim for the enemy vessel, and prepare to fire!

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: How dare you hurt Lord Perospero!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Get out of here, Big Mom Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She isn't cut out for the sword.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carrot will become a great swords- man under me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: doesn't matter how you do it. Become a strong warrior,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And wait! Everyone, sooner or later, gets their own time to shine!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
